test_cases.input_summary: Morning Show (upbeat daytime), 4 link types needed: 8am intro (rail strike top story), bridge into nutritionist interview after music, back anno after community garden package, programme close.
test_cases.output_summary: All 4 links delivered with correct labels and speaker notes. Intro sets agenda cleanly. Bridge creates forward pull without over-teasing. Back anno accurate and brief. Close warm and correctly paced.
test_cases.notes: Actionability and fluency high — links went to air without edit in test. Relevance slightly marked: intro link developed the rail story slightly further than the input called for.

test_cases.input_summary: Late-night current affairs strand, intimate and measured tone. Bridge from actuality clip of a refugee interview into a studio discussion panel. Back anno after expert interview about mental health policy.
test_cases.output_summary: Bridge is properly reflective and does not undercut the emotional weight of the actuality clip. Transition to discussion panel is clean. Back anno names the subject area without editorialising.
test_cases.notes: Strong consistency and relevance. Coherence slightly marked: the bridge opens with a slightly literary construction that works on page but may need loosening for some presenters. Flagged in Known Limitations.

test_cases.input_summary: Weekend breakfast show, irreverent and fast-paced. 3 links: cold open (bank holiday Monday, themed episode on local food markets), bridge into a 90-second food market package, close.
test_cases.output_summary: Cold open is energetic and sets the theme clearly in 20 seconds. Bridge into package uses a light tease that doesn't over-promise. Close lands the bank holiday warmth without being saccharine.
test_cases.notes: Excellent fluency throughout. Relevance marked slightly: the close ran 35 seconds against a 30-second target — minor overrun easily trimmed.
